error_signature: deadlock due to concurrent UPSERT operations
title: Deadlock during concurrent UPSERT in PostgreSQL
symptom: When multiple executions of the workflow run in parallel, PostgreSQL may deadlock due to concurrent UPSERT operations on the same row.
applies_when: Multiple parallel executions of the workflow
root_cause: n8n allows multiple instances of a workflow to run simultaneously, which can lead to deadlocks in PostgreSQL when multiple transactions attempt to modify the same row at the same time without proper locking.
fix_steps: Lock the row using 'SELECT id FROM my_table WHERE id = {{$json[“id”]}} FOR UPDATE;'
agent_instruction: Implement row locking in your PostgreSQL UPSERT operation to prevent deadlocks.
